usage: skyline [-h] [-y YEAR] [-u USER] [-f] [-d] [-w] [-a] [-o OUTPUT]

Generate a 3D model of a user's GitHub contribution history

options:
  -h, --help           show this help message and exit
  -y, --year YEAR      Year or year range (e.g., 2024 or 2014-2024)
  -u, --user USER      GitHub username (optional, defaults to authenticated
                       user)
  -f, --full           Generate contribution graph from join year to current
                       year
  -d, --debug          Enable debug logging
  -w, --web            Open GitHub profile (authenticated or specified user).
  -a, --art-only       Generate only ASCII preview
  -o, --output OUTPUT  Output file path (optional)
